/usr/bin/c++  -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/check_urdf.dir/src/check_urdf.cpp.o -o ../bin/check_urdf  ../lib/liburdfdom_model.a ../lib/liburdfdom_world.a /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/console_bridge/lib/libconsole_bridge.a /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/tinyxml2/lib/libtinyxml2.a
